did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article ('concise review of various medical expert systems') that summarizes and compares existing techniques from other studies. It does not conduct original experiments or use AI/ML to obtain new results; it only reports methods (e.g., K-means, CNN, SVM) and accuracies from cited literature.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
